title: Add regression test for marketPulseFormatters.formatPercent zero handling
context: marketPulseFormatters.ts has a formatPercent() helper that, for value === 0, currently emits '0.00%' but should emit '0%' to match the rest of the dashboard. This was raised in last week's UI review.
problem: There is no test guarding formatPercent's zero behavior, so the bug can regress.
expected_behavior: formatPercent(0) returns '0%'. formatPercent(0.001) returns '0.10%'. formatPercent(-0) returns '0%'. Negative values render with a single leading minus.
current_behavior: No tests exist for this helper.
acceptance_criteria: Test file exists under tests/ that exercises formatPercent for 0, -0, 0.001, -1.5, 100.
Tests fail on the current implementation (proving the regression bites) and pass after the one-line fix.
